data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG boss. EXACT layout: 2 rows by 2 columns, four equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Background must be 100% solid flat chroma-key magenta #FF00FF with no texture, no gradient, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines, no text.

Subject: normal style elite thunder demon general for Samsara Ascension; imposing armored xianxia demon, dark bronze armor, compact horned helm silhouette, short heavy polearm held close to the torso, tiny purple-blue thunder accents hugging the armor. Clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG boss sprite, readable at small size, not cute, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Framing/containment: full body visible in every frame, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable feet anchor line, same body height and scale in all frames. The complete subject must occupy only the central 50–55% of each cell, with very large flat magenta padding on all sides. Keep horns, shoulders, weapon, cape, tassels, sparks, and feet far from all cell edges. Nothing may touch or approach a cell boundary. Entire subject, weapon, horn, hair, cape, tassel, sleeve, and tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell. No detached projectile, no impact burst, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Animation: idle with real pose changes, not scaling/camera/glow/slide only. Frame order:
1) top-left: neutral guard posture, feet planted, polearm vertical and close to body.
2) top-right: breathing inhale, shoulders rise, tiny thunder accents brighten tightly around armor.
3) bottom-left: weight shifts to the opposite foot, cape cloth and helm tassel sway inward, polearm angle changes only slightly.
4) bottom-right: settle back toward the first pose, thunder dims, loop returns naturally.

Animation consistency: preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, armor marks, face/eyes, helm, weapon design, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact cloth motion, weapon angle, and tiny attached thunder accents may change. Make the pose changes clear and believable while keeping the character fully contained and centered. High readability at small size, clean edges, polished hand-painted fantasy sprite sheet.
